Document:
# Core Rule 2 ## Respect each other.
- [color=red][bold]In and out of character discrimination based upon race, sexuality, and gender is strictly prohibited. If in-character actions are becoming out of character insults, it will be considered a rule break.[/bold][/color]
- [color=green][bold]In character discrimination based upon species, disabilities, injuries, and religion is allowed. Speciest discrimination and other IC discrimination can be used as a roleplay reason to escalate into conflict with another player but proper escalation and roleplay should still be followed first.[/bold][/color]
- [color=yellow][bold]Speciesm is allowed, slurs regarding species cannot be parodies of real life slurs like "ligger".[/bold][/color]
- [italics][color=green]If you believe a word will go too far, utilize admin help (F1) to ask for clarification. No response means you cannot say it.[/italics][/color]
